note_evidence: Chronic, ongoing ~6 years. Dull ache across the beltline. Worse with prolonged sitting (job applications) and carrying laundry up three flights. Currently 3/10, climbing to 5–6/10 some evenings.
rationale: Duration, location, severity, and aggravating factors all documented.

note_evidence: No radiation, numbness, tingling, or weakness in legs. No bowel or bladder dysfunction.
rationale: Red flag screen negative documented.

note_evidence: Improved with stretching and heat.
rationale: Relieving factors documented.

note_evidence: ran out months ago and stopped refilling after insurance switched to wife's plan.
rationale: Stopping meds after insurance change documented.

note_evidence: Previously diagnosed but never treated; prescription was not filled due to cost ($40)
rationale: Untreated hypertension due to cost documented.

note_evidence: Blood pressure (in office): 106/67
rationale: Office BP documented.

note_evidence: Home readings via wife's machine reportedly ~150s systolic most mornings.
rationale: Elevated home BP documented.

note_evidence: Encourage movement: daily walking, previously reviewed stretches ... Avoid prolonged sitting; set timer to stand every 30 minutes
rationale: Movement counseling documented.

note_evidence: Unemployed since April; actively job searching. Wife currently working; rent being covered but finances tight.
rationale: Job loss and financial strain documented.

note_evidence: Air conditioning non-functional for 3 weeks (reached 95°F indoors); leak under kitchen sink with visible growth; broken elevator requiring three-flight stair climbing. Landlord largely unresponsive.
rationale: Housing conditions documented.

note_evidence: Front office to provide tenant rights packet and county housing hotline information before departure
rationale: Housing resources provided documented.

note_evidence: Reports stress related to job loss, including early morning waking (~4 a.m.) with financial worry. Denies feeling he is "falling apart."
rationale: Stress with early waking, coping documented.

note_evidence: Anxiety questionnaire: 1 (minimal) ... Situational stress related to unemployment ... no evidence of anxiety disorder or depression
rationale: Anxiety score 1 minimal and situational stress assessment documented.

note_evidence: patient advised to report early if stress worsens (nightly sleep disruption, worsening mood)
rationale: Follow-up counseling for stress documented.

note_evidence: Minimal — approximately one beer on Sundays. AUDIT-C score of 1.

rationale: Former smoker quit ~20 years documented.
